info.name: Mowdmin Mobile BE API
info.description: Postman collection aligned to current /api/v1 routes with explicit user/admin separation and admin subfolders.

request.description: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for a pending donation. Returns a clientSecret for the frontend to complete payment.
Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for a pending order. Returns a clientSecret for the frontend to complete payment.
Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent. Type must be one of: order, donation, subscription. Returns clientSecret for frontend payment completion.

item.name: Membership
item.description: Church membership registration — tracks baptism interest, communion alerts, and approval status (pending → approved → active).

request.description: Register for church membership. Fields: userId (required), baptismInterest (bool), communionAlert (bool). Status starts as 'pending'.
Type must be one of: info, alert, reminder, system. Metadata is optional and can contain any key-value pairs.
